001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.remote;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022
023import java.lang.reflect.*;
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.rest.common.utils.*;
029
030/**
031 * Holds resolved metadata for an interface annotated with {@link Remote @Remote}.
032 *
033 * <p>
034 * Built once per interface class and cached for efficient proxy invocation.
035 * Use {@link #of(Class)} to obtain instances.
036 *
037 * <p>
038 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
039 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
040 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
041 * (and possibly earlier).
042 *
043 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
044 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
045 * </ul>
046 *
047 * @since 9.2.1
048 */
049public final class RrpcInterfaceMeta {
050
051   private static final Map<Class<?>, RrpcInterfaceMeta> CACHE = new java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap<>();
052
053   private final Class<?> iface;
054   private final String basePath;
055   // Interface-level base/host override: an annotation-declared substitute for the client root URL.
056   private final String baseUrl;
057   // Interface-level content negotiation: default accept + contentType media-type overrides.
058   private final String accept;
059   private final String contentType;
060   private final List<Map.Entry<String,String>> headers;
061   private final List<Map.Entry<String,String>> queryData;
062   private final List<Map.Entry<String,String>> formData;
063   // Interface-level custom part serializer: from @HttpPartMarshalling(serializer=...) on the interface.
064   private final HttpPartSerializer partSerializer;
065   // Interface-level cross-cutting call policy: defaults inherited by every method.
066   private final Class<?>[] interceptorClasses;
067   private final String timeout;
068   private final int retries;
069   private final boolean retryNonIdempotent;
070   private final boolean throwOnError;
071   private final Map<Method, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta> methodMetas;
072   private final Map<String, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta> methodMetasByPath;
073
074   private RrpcInterfaceMeta(Class<?> iface) {
075      this(iface, false);
076   }
077
078   /**
079    * Constructor.
080    *
081    * <p>
082    * Provides backwards compatibility with the classic {@code RrpcInterfaceMeta} signature; the {@code uri}
083    * argument is accepted for API parity and is currently ignored by this implementation.
084    *
085    * <p>
086    * Unlike {@link #of(Class)}, this constructor includes <i>all</i> public interface methods (matching the
087    * classic behavior), not just those annotated with the {@code @Remote*} annotations.
088    *
089    * @param iface The interface class. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
090    * @param uri Reserved for compatibility with the classic constructor. May be <jk>null</jk>.
091    */
092   @SuppressWarnings({
093      "java:S1172" // 'uri' is part of the public constructor signature retained for API parity with the classic RrpcInterfaceMeta; intentionally ignored
094   })
095   public RrpcInterfaceMeta(Class<?> iface, String uri) {
096      this(iface, true);
097   }
098
099   private RrpcInterfaceMeta(Class<?> iface, boolean includeUnannotated) {
100      if (!iface.isInterface())
101         throw iaex("Class {0} is not an interface", iface.getName());
102      var remote = iface.getAnnotation(Remote.class);
103
104      this.iface = iface;
105      this.basePath = buildBasePath(remote);
106      this.baseUrl = remote == null ? "" : VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(remote.baseUrl());
107      this.accept = remote == null ? "" : VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(remote.accept());
108      this.contentType = remote == null ? "" : VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(remote.contentType());
109      this.headers = buildHeaders(remote);
110      this.queryData = remote == null ? List.of() : parseConstantParts(remote.queryData(), '=');
111      this.formData = remote == null ? List.of() : parseConstantParts(remote.formData(), '=');
112      var hpm = iface.getAnnotation(HttpPartMarshalling.class);
113      this.partSerializer = hpm == null ? null : RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.resolvePartSerializer(hpm.serializer());
114      // Interface-level cross-cutting policy defaults.
115      this.interceptorClasses = remote == null ? new Class<?>[0] : remote.interceptors();
116      this.timeout = remote == null ? "" : remote.timeout();
117      this.retries = remote == null ? 0 : remote.retries();
118      this.retryNonIdempotent = remote != null && remote.retryNonIdempotent();
119      this.throwOnError = remote != null && remote.throwOnError();
120
121      var metas = new LinkedHashMap<Method, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta>();
122      for (var m : iface.getMethods()) {
123         var opt = buildMethodMeta(m);
124         if (opt.isPresent()) {
125            metas.put(m, opt.get());
126         } else if (includeUnannotated) {
127            metas.put(m, new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta(m, "POST", buildSignaturePath(m), RemoteReturn.BODY));
128         }
129      }
130      this.methodMetas = Collections.unmodifiableMap(metas);
131
132      var byPath = new LinkedHashMap<String, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta>();
133      for (var v : metas.values())
134         byPath.put(v.getPath(), v);
135      this.methodMetasByPath = Collections.unmodifiableMap(byPath);
136   }
137
138   private static String buildBasePath(Remote remote) {
139      if (remote == null)
140         return "";
141      return remote.path().isEmpty() ? remote.value() : remote.path();
142   }
143
144   /**
145    * Resolves the interface-level constant headers declared via {@link Remote#headers()} and the client-version
146    * header derived from {@link Remote#version()}/{@link Remote#versionHeader()}.
147    *
148    * <p>
149    * Each {@code headers()} entry is a {@code "Name: value"} string (the colon-separated form), resolved through
150    * {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT} so values such as {@code "$S{sysprop}"} expand.  A non-empty {@code version()}
151    * appends a {@code Client-Version} header (or the name given by {@code versionHeader()}).
152    *
153    * <p>
154    * <b>Note:</b> {@link Remote#headerList()} is intentionally <i>not</i> honored by the next-gen engine — its value
155    * type is a classic {@code org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.HeaderList} subclass that is specific to the
156    * Apache-HttpClient transport.  Use {@code headers()} for transport-agnostic constant headers.
157    */
158   private static List<Map.Entry<String,String>> buildHeaders(Remote remote) {
159      if (remote == null)
160         return List.of();
161      var l = new ArrayList<>(parseConstantParts(remote.headers(), ':'));
162      var version = VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(remote.version());
163      if (! version.isEmpty()) {
164         var vh = remote.versionHeader().isEmpty() ? "Client-Version" : VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(remote.versionHeader());
165         l.add(Map.entry(vh, version));
166      }
167      return Collections.unmodifiableList(l);
168   }
169
170   /**
171    * Parses an array of constant {@code "name<delim>value"} strings into resolved name/value entries.
172    *
173    * <p>
174    * Each entry is resolved through {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT} (so values such as {@code "$S{sysprop}"} expand), then
175    * split on the first occurrence of {@code delim} ({@code ':'} for the {@code "Name: value"} header form, {@code '='}
176    * for the {@code "name=value"} query/form-data form).  Entries with no delimiter are skipped.  Both the name and the
177    * value are trimmed.
178    *
179    * @param entries The raw annotation strings (may be empty).
180    * @param delim The name/value delimiter character.
181    * @return An unmodifiable list of resolved name/value entries. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
182    */
183   static List<Map.Entry<String,String>> parseConstantParts(String[] entries, char delim) {
184      if (entries.length == 0)
185         return List.of();
186      var l = new ArrayList<Map.Entry<String,String>>();
187      for (var e : entries) {
188         var s = VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(e);
189         var i = s.indexOf(delim);
190         if (i != -1)
191            l.add(Map.entry(s.substring(0, i).trim(), s.substring(i + 1).trim()));
192      }
193      return Collections.unmodifiableList(l);
194   }
195
196   private static String buildSignaturePath(Method m) {
197      var sb = new StringBuilder(128);
198      sb.append(m.getName()).append('/');
199      Class<?>[] pt = m.getParameterTypes();
200      if (pt.length == 0)
201         return sb.toString();
202      sb.append('(');
203      for (var i = 0; i < pt.length; i++) {
204         if (i > 0)
205            sb.append(',');
206         appendTypeName(sb, pt[i]);
207      }
208      sb.append(')');
209      return sb.toString();
210   }
211
212   private static void appendTypeName(StringBuilder sb, Class<?> c) {
213      if (c.isArray()) {
214         appendTypeName(sb, c.getComponentType());
215         sb.append("[]");
216      } else {
217         sb.append(c.getName());
218      }
219   }
220
221   /**
222    * Returns the {@link RrpcInterfaceMeta} for the given interface, creating and caching it if necessary.
223    *
224    * @param iface The interface class. Must be annotated with {@link Remote}. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
225    * @return The metadata. Never <jk>null</jk>.
226    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If the class is not an interface or not annotated with {@link Remote}.
227    */
228   public static RrpcInterfaceMeta of(Class<?> iface) {
229      assertArgNotNull("iface", iface);
230      if (!iface.isInterface())
231         throw iaex("Class {0} is not an interface", iface.getName());
232      if (iface.getAnnotation(Remote.class) == null)
233         throw iaex("Class {0} is not annotated with @Remote", iface.getName());
234      return CACHE.computeIfAbsent(iface, RrpcInterfaceMeta::new);
235   }
236
237   /**
238    * Returns the interface class.
239    *
240    * @return The interface. Never <jk>null</jk>.
241    */
242   public Class<?> getInterface() {
243      return iface;
244   }
245
246   /**
247    * Returns the Java class of this interface.
248    *
249    * <p>
250    * Alias for {@link #getInterface()} provided for backwards compatibility with the classic API.
251    *
252    * @return The Java class. Never <jk>null</jk>.
253    */
254   public Class<?> getJavaClass() {
255      return getInterface();
256   }
257
258   /**
259    * Returns the method metadata keyed by the resolved method path.
260    *
261    * @return An unmodifiable map from path to {@link RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
262    */
263   public Map<String, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta> getMethodsByPath() {
264      return methodMetasByPath;
265   }
266
267   /**
268    * Returns the method metadata for the given path.
269    *
270    * @param path The path. May be <jk>null</jk>.
271    * @return The matching method metadata, or <jk>null</jk> if no match was found.
272    */
273   public RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta getMethodMetaByPath(String path) {
274      return path == null ? null : methodMetasByPath.get(path);
275   }
276
277   /**
278    * Returns the base path from the {@link Remote#path() Remote} annotation.
279    *
280    * @return The base path. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
281    */
282   public String getBasePath() {
283      return basePath;
284   }
285
286   /**
287    * Returns the interface-level base/host override, or an empty string if none.
288    *
289    * <p>
290    * Sourced from {@link Remote#baseUrl()} (resolved through {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT}).  Used as a substitute for
291    * the client root URL when neither an {@link org.apache.juneau.http.Url @Url} parameter nor a method-level
292    * {@code baseUrl} is in effect; preserves the interface base path + method path + templating.
293    *
294    * @return The base/host override. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
295    */
296   public String getBaseUrl() {
297      return baseUrl;
298   }
299
300   /**
301    * Returns the interface-level default {@code contentType} media-type override, or an empty string.
302    *
303    * <p>
304    * Sourced from {@link Remote#contentType()} (resolved through {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT}).  Used as the default
305    * request-serializer/{@code Content-Type} selector for methods that declare no method-level
306    * {@link RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta#getContentType()}.
307    *
308    * @return The {@code contentType} media type. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
309    */
310   public String getContentType() {
311      return contentType;
312   }
313
314   /**
315    * Returns the interface-level default {@code accept} media-type override, or an empty string.
316    *
317    * <p>
318    * Sourced from {@link Remote#accept()} (resolved through {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT}).  Used as the default
319    * {@code Accept} header / response-parser fallback for methods that declare no method-level
320    * {@link RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta#getAccept()}.
321    *
322    * @return The {@code accept} media type. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
323    */
324   public String getAccept() {
325      return accept;
326   }
327
328   /**
329    * Returns the interface-level constant headers to set on every request.
330    *
331    * <p>
332    * Includes the headers declared via {@link Remote#headers()} plus the client-version header derived from
333    * {@link Remote#version()}/{@link Remote#versionHeader()} (if a version was specified).
334    *
335    * @return An unmodifiable list of name/value header entries. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
336    */
337   public List<Map.Entry<String,String>> getHeaders() {
338      return headers;
339   }
340
341   /**
342    * Returns the interface-level constant query parameters to apply to every request.
343    *
344    * <p>
345    * Resolved from {@link Remote#queryData()} (the {@code "name=value"} form, with {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT}
346    * expansion).
347    *
348    * @return An unmodifiable list of name/value query entries. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
349    */
350   public List<Map.Entry<String,String>> getQueryData() {
351      return queryData;
352   }
353
354   /**
355    * Returns the interface-level constant form-data parameters to apply to every request.
356    *
357    * <p>
358    * Resolved from {@link Remote#formData()} (the {@code "name=value"} form, with {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT}
359    * expansion).
360    *
361    * @return An unmodifiable list of name/value form-data entries. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
362    */
363   public List<Map.Entry<String,String>> getFormData() {
364      return formData;
365   }
366
367   /**
368    * Returns the interface-level custom {@link HttpPartSerializer}, or <jk>null</jk> if none.
369    *
370    * <p>
371    * Sourced from {@code @HttpPartMarshalling(serializer=...)} declared on the interface.  Used as
372    * the lowest-precedence default for part serialization: a parameter-level or method-level
373    * {@code @HttpPartMarshalling} serializer takes precedence over it.
374    *
375    * @return The resolved part serializer, or <jk>null</jk>.
376    */
377   public HttpPartSerializer getPartSerializer() {
378      return partSerializer;
379   }
380
381   /**
382    * Returns the interface-level interceptor classes, or an empty array if none.
383    *
384    * <p>
385    * Each class implements the next-gen client-side interceptor SPI and is resolved to an instance by the next-gen
386    * {@code RemoteClient} (the raw {@code Class<?>[]} type avoids a module dependency on {@code juneau-rest-client}).
387    *
388    * @return The interceptor classes. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
389    */
390   public Class<?>[] getInterceptorClasses() {
391      return interceptorClasses;
392   }
393
394   /**
395    * Returns the interface-level default per-call timeout as a duration string, or an empty string.
396    *
397    * @return The timeout duration string. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
398    */
399   public String getTimeout() {
400      return timeout;
401   }
402
403   /**
404    * Returns the interface-level default max retry attempts, or {@code 0} if retries are disabled.
405    *
406    * @return The retry count.
407    */
408   public int getRetries() {
409      return retries;
410   }
411
412   /**
413    * Returns whether the interface opts non-idempotent verbs (POST/PATCH) into automatic retries.
414    *
415    * @return <jk>true</jk> if non-idempotent retries are opted in at the interface level.
416    */
417   public boolean isRetryNonIdempotent() {
418      return retryNonIdempotent;
419   }
420
421   /**
422    * Returns whether the interface throws a generic exception on an unmatched error response.
423    *
424    * @return <jk>true</jk> if {@code throwOnError} is set at the interface level.
425    */
426   public boolean isThrowOnError() {
427      return throwOnError;
428   }
429
430   /**
431    * Returns the method metadata for all annotated methods.
432    *
433    * @return An unmodifiable map from {@link Method} to {@link RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
434    */
435   public Map<Method, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta> getMethodMetas() {
436      return methodMetas;
437   }
438
439   /**
440    * Returns the metadata for the given method, or {@code null} if the method has no remote annotation.
441    *
442    * @param method The method. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
443    * @return The metadata, or <jk>null</jk>.
444    */
445   public RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta getMethodMeta(Method method) {
446      return methodMetas.get(method);
447   }
448
449   @SuppressWarnings({
450      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity inherent to per-verb interface-metadata parsing; refactoring would reduce readability without benefit.
451   })
452   private static Optional<RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta> buildMethodMeta(Method m) {
453      if (m.isAnnotationPresent(RemoteGet.class)) {
454         var a = m.getAnnotation(RemoteGet.class);
455         return o(simpleMeta(m, "GET", a.path(), a.value(), a.returns(), a.headers(), a.queryData(), a.formData(), a.baseUrl(),
456            new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy(a.interceptors(), a.timeout(), a.retries(), a.retryNonIdempotent(), a.throwOnError()),
457            neg(a.accept(), a.contentType())));
458      }
459      if (m.isAnnotationPresent(RemotePost.class)) {
460         var a = m.getAnnotation(RemotePost.class);
461         return o(simpleMeta(m, "POST", a.path(), a.value(), a.returns(), a.headers(), a.queryData(), a.formData(), a.baseUrl(),
462            new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy(a.interceptors(), a.timeout(), a.retries(), a.retryNonIdempotent(), a.throwOnError()),
463            neg(a.accept(), a.contentType())));
464      }
465      if (m.isAnnotationPresent(RemotePut.class)) {
466         var a = m.getAnnotation(RemotePut.class);
467         return o(simpleMeta(m, "PUT", a.path(), a.value(), a.returns(), a.headers(), a.queryData(), a.formData(), a.baseUrl(),
468            new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy(a.interceptors(), a.timeout(), a.retries(), a.retryNonIdempotent(), a.throwOnError()),
469            neg(a.accept(), a.contentType())));
470      }
471      if (m.isAnnotationPresent(RemotePatch.class)) {
472         var a = m.getAnnotation(RemotePatch.class);
473         return o(simpleMeta(m, "PATCH", a.path(), a.value(), a.returns(), a.headers(), a.queryData(), a.formData(), a.baseUrl(),
474            new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy(a.interceptors(), a.timeout(), a.retries(), a.retryNonIdempotent(), a.throwOnError()),
475            neg(a.accept(), a.contentType())));
476      }
477      if (m.isAnnotationPresent(RemoteDelete.class)) {
478         var a = m.getAnnotation(RemoteDelete.class);
479         return o(simpleMeta(m, "DELETE", a.path(), a.value(), a.returns(), a.headers(), a.queryData(), a.formData(), a.baseUrl(),
480            new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy(a.interceptors(), a.timeout(), a.retries(), a.retryNonIdempotent(), a.throwOnError()),
481            neg(a.accept(), a.contentType())));
482      }
483      if (m.isAnnotationPresent(RemoteOp.class))
484         return o(buildRemoteOpMeta(m, m.getAnnotation(RemoteOp.class)));
485
486      return oe();
487   }
488
489   /**
490    * Builds a resolved {@link RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.ContentNegotiation} carrier from the raw
491    * {@code accept}/{@code contentType} annotation members, expanding {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT} variables.
492    */
493   private static RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.ContentNegotiation neg(String accept, String contentType) {
494      return new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.ContentNegotiation(VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(accept), VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(contentType));
495   }
496
497   @SuppressWarnings({
498      "java:S107" // The 11 parameters mirror the verb-annotation surface (verb/path/value/return + the 3 constant-part arrays + the baseUrl override + the cross-cutting policy carrier + the content-negotiation carrier) threaded into the method-meta; holder types would add indirection without improving this internal builder.
499   })
500   private static RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta simpleMeta(Method m, String httpMethod, String pathAttr, String valueAttr, RemoteReturn returnType, String[] headers, String[] queryData, String[] formData, String baseUrl, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy policy, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.ContentNegotiation neg) {
501      var path = pathAttr.isEmpty() ? valueAttr : pathAttr;
502      return new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta(m, httpMethod, path, returnType,
503         parseConstantParts(headers, ':'),
504         parseConstantParts(queryData, '='),
505         parseConstantParts(formData, '='),
506         VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(baseUrl),
507         policy,
508         neg);
509   }
510
511   private static RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta buildRemoteOpMeta(Method m, RemoteOp a) {
512      var method = a.method().trim();
513      var path = a.path().trim();
514      var returnType = a.returns();
515      var v = a.value().trim();
516      if (!v.isEmpty()) {
517         var i = v.indexOf(' ');
518         if (i == -1) {
519            method = v.toUpperCase();
520         } else {
521            method = v.substring(0, i).trim().toUpperCase();
522            path = v.substring(i).trim();
523         }
524      }
525      if (path.isEmpty())
526         path = HttpUtils.detectHttpPath(m, isEmpty(method) ? null : method);
527      if (method.isEmpty())
528         method = HttpUtils.detectHttpMethod(m, true, "GET");
529      if (!isOneOf(method, "DELETE", "GET", "POST", "PUT", "OPTIONS", "HEAD", "CONNECT", "TRACE", "PATCH"))
530         throw iaex("Invalid @RemoteOp method ''{0}'' on {1}.{2}", method, m.getDeclaringClass().getName(), m.getName());
531      return new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta(m, method, trimSlashes(path), returnType,
532         parseConstantParts(a.headers(), ':'),
533         parseConstantParts(a.queryData(), '='),
534         parseConstantParts(a.formData(), '='),
535         VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(a.baseUrl()),
536         new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy(a.interceptors(), a.timeout(), a.retries(), a.retryNonIdempotent(), a.throwOnError()),
537         neg(a.accept(), a.contentType()));
538   }
539
540   @Override /* Object */
541   public String toString() {
542      return "@Remote " + iface.getSimpleName() + " (basePath=" + basePath + ", methods=" + methodMetas.size() + ")";
543   }
544}
